normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_bst_preserved (t : Tree) (k : Int) (hb : IsBst t) :
  IsBst (bstInsert t k)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Strict BST validity is preserved after insertion.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_keys_absent_insert (t : Tree) (k : Int)
  (hb : IsBst t) (habs : k ∉ keys t) :
  List.Perm (keys (bstInsert t k)) (k :: keys t)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: When the key is absent, the output key list is the input keys with one copy of the new key adjoined.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU4_keys_present_unchanged (t : Tree) (k : Int)
  (hb : IsBst t) (hp : k ∈ keys t) :
  List.Perm (keys (bstInsert t k)) (keys t)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: When the key is already present, insertion is a no-op on the key multiset.
